content.text:
You are applying code migration fixes to a single file.

File: /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/forklift-console-plugin/source/src/plans/details/tabs/Mappings/components/PlanMappingEditButton/PlanMappingEditButton.tsx

Apply ALL of the following 3 fixes to this file:

### Fix 1
Line: 30
Rule [semver-packages-react-core-src-components-button-button-buttonprops-d-ts-button-variant-type-changed]:
Property 'Button.variant' had its type changed (property): Return type of `variant` changed from `'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'` to `'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'`

File: packages/react-core/src/components/Button/Button.ButtonProps.d.ts
Before: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'
After: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'

Incident context:
  componentName: Button
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  propName: variant
  propValue: secondary

Fix strategy:
Strategy: PropTypeChange
Component: Button
Prop: variant
From: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'
To: 'control' | 'danger' | 'link' | 'plain' | 'primary' | 'secondary' | 'stateful' | 'tertiary' | 'warning'

Code context:
```
   29        <Button
   30          variant={ButtonVariant.secondary}
   31          icon={<PencilAltIcon />}

```

### Fix 2
Line: 29
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-button]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <Button> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <Button> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <Button variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></Button>
  After:  <Button variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <Button> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <Button><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</Button>
  After:  <Button icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</Button>

Incident context:
  componentName: Button
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentName: __ComponentReturn__

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: Button
Prop: icon

Code context:
```
   28      <>
   29        <Button
   30          variant={ButtonVariant.secondary}

```

### Fix 3
Line: 41
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-helpertextitem]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <HelperTextItem> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <HelperTextItem> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <HelperTextItem variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></HelperTextItem>
  After:  <HelperTextItem variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <HelperTextItem> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <HelperTextItem><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</HelperTextItem>
  After:  <HelperTextItem icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</HelperTextItem>

Incident context:
  componentName: HelperTextItem
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentFrom: @patternfly/react-core
  parentName: HelperText

Fix strategy:
Strategy: LlmAssisted
Component: HelperTextItem
Prop: icon

Code context:
```
   40          <HelperText className="forklift-plan-mapping-edit-button__helper-text">
   41            <HelperTextItem variant="indeterminate">
   42              {t(

```

Instructions:
1. Read the file at /home/jmontleo/semver-analyzer/build/batch-run-20260604T185102/forklift-console-plugin/source/src/plans/details/tabs/Mappings/components/PlanMappingEditButton/PlanMappingEditButton.tsx
2. Process each fix INDEPENDENTLY in sequence. For each fix:
   a. Identify the exact code affected (line number and affected element)
   b. Determine the specific change needed (add/remove/rename identifiers, update references)
   c. Track all changes for the final write
3. Make the minimum edits necessary — do not change unrelated code, but DO clean up any artifacts caused by your changes (e.g., remove imports that are no longer referenced, delete dead declarations)
4. After determining your changes, reason through any functional side effects: verify that your edits preserve the existing behavior of the surrounding code. If a migration change makes existing variables, state, or logic redundant, clean up the affected code so the file remains correct and consistent.
5. Do NOT revert any changes that were already applied in previous passes
6. Write the fixed file once with ALL changes from every fix applied
7. REQUIRED: If companion test files are listed above, read EACH one now. Do NOT skip this step. For each test file, check whether your changes to the main file would cause test failures (e.g., portal rendering means getByText/getByRole won't find dropdown content, renamed attributes break selectors). If a test would break, apply the fix and write the updated test file.


Before writing, reason through each fix step by step to ensure nothing is missed. Then read the file, make the edits, and write it.

After writing the file, produce a '## Changes Applied' section that lists each change you made, each fix that was already applied (no change needed), and each fix you could not apply (with a brief reason). This summary is used by subsequent processing steps.
Let me start by reading the file to understand its current state.

Now let me reason through each fix:

### Fix 1: `Button.variant` type changed
Line 30: `variant={ButtonVariant.secondary}` — The type change adds `'stateful'` to the union but `'secondary'` is still valid. The value `ButtonVariant.secondary` is still in the allowed set. **No code change needed.**

### Fix 2: Icon children to `icon` prop on `<Button>`
Line 29-37: The `<Button>` already has `icon={<PencilAltIcon />}` as a prop (line 31), and the text `{t('Edit mappings')}` is the children. Looking at the code, the icon is already passed via the `icon` prop, not as children. **This fix is already applied — no change needed.**

### Fix 3: Icon children to `icon` prop on `<HelperTextItem>`
Line 41: `<HelperTextItem variant="indeterminate">` — The children is text `{t('The edit mappings button is disabled...')}`, not an icon. There's no icon in the children of this `HelperTextItem`. The rule fired on this component but there's no icon to move. **No applicable icon to move — no change needed.**

Wait, let me re-read the fix more carefully. The rule says "icon content in `<HelperTextItem>` must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children." But looking at the actual code, `<HelperTextItem>` only contains text, no icon. The incident may have been a false positive based on component scanning, or the `variant="indeterminate"` might imply an icon. Let me check if `variant="indeterminate"` is even a valid variant in PF v6... Actually the rule title is about icon-children-to-prop, but the actual content here has no icon children. The `HelperTextItem` just has text children. This appears to be a non-applicable incident.

All three fixes require no actual code changes — the file is already correct as-is.

## Changes Applied

1. **Fix 1** (`Button.variant` type changed): **No change needed.** The value `ButtonVariant.secondary` is still valid in the new type union (`'secondary'` was not removed; `'stateful'` was added).

2. **Fix 2** (`sd-icon-children-to-prop-button`): **Already applied.** The `<Button>` component already passes the icon via the `icon` prop (`icon={<PencilAltIcon />}` on line 31) rather than as children. The only children content is `{t('Edit mappings')}` (text).

3. **Fix 3** (`sd-icon-children-to-prop-helpertextitem`): **No change needed.** The `<HelperTextItem>` on line 41 has no icon children — it only contains a text string via `{t(...)}`. There is no icon element to move to an `icon` prop.
